ground_truth.title: MBA | Harvard Business School
ground_truth.main_content: Harvard Business School (HBS) offers a two-year, full-time MBA Program with a general management curriculum focused on real-world practice. The MBA Program provides students with unparalleled access to faculty, resources, and a powerful network that lasts a lifetime. The section experience creates a community of trust where students challenge and support each other through rigorous case discussions. Students quickly discover that the section experience gets them fully engaged during their time at HBS. The program combines bold ideas, powerful pedagogy, and collaborative cohort-based learning to deliver unparalleled management education. HBS provides financial aid options including tuition assistance, summer fellowships, and career support funds. The case method and field method form the foundation of the academic experience, preparing students to lead in any organization worldwide.
